channel.title: Alternative Asset Literacy
channel.description: Investment intelligence platform covering alternative assets, DeFi, behavioral economics, art markets, ESG & climate finance, and gender lens investing.

item.title: Glossary expanded to 351 terms — new Gender Lens Investing category
item.description: Free glossary now covers 351 research-sourced terms across 6 categories: Art (111), DeFi & Crypto (101), Alternative Assets (47), ESG & Climate (42), Behavioral Economics (33), and a new Gender Lens Investing category (17 terms). Searchable, filterable, and Schema.org indexed.

item.title: Module: Women & Alternative Assets
item.description: Structural barriers women face in investing, the gender wealth gap, and strategies for building portfolios in alternative asset classes.

item.title: Module: Alternative Assets 101
item.description: Private equity, venture capital, hedge funds, real estate, commodities, and collectibles. GP/LP structures, fee mechanics, and portfolio allocation.

item.title: Module: Behavioral Economics & Investing
item.description: How cognitive biases shape investment decisions. Anchoring, loss aversion, overconfidence, FOMO, and gender differences in risk perception.

item.title: Module: Gender Lens Investing
item.description: Gender-smart investment strategies: gender bonds, the 2X Challenge, WEPs, board diversity metrics, and evaluating companies through a gender equity framework.

item.title: Module: DeFi Fundamentals
item.description: Blockchain, smart contracts, stablecoins, DAOs, AMMs, and CBDCs. DeFi from first principles for crypto-curious investors.

item.title: Module: Art as Investment
item.description: The art market as an asset class. Auction mechanics, provenance, fractional ownership, art-secured lending, and portfolio diversification.

item.title: Module: ESG & Climate Investing
item.description: Green bonds, carbon markets, TCFD, EU Taxonomy, SBTi, and separating genuine impact from greenwashing.

item.title: Module: DeFi Investing Strategies
item.description: Yield farming, liquidity provision, staking strategies, risk management, and portfolio construction with digital assets.

item.title: Module: Kahlo x Basquiat — Identity, Market & Legacy
item.description: How identity, race, gender, and cultural context shape art market valuations. A comparative study through the lens of alternative investment.

item.title: AI discovery endpoints launched
item.description: Now discoverable by AI agents via llms.txt, OpenAPI manifest, course catalog, glossary endpoint, and partnership API.
